model.televerket.stg__crm_customers.name: stg__crm_customers
model.televerket.stg__crm_customers.description: One row per customer from the CRM source. Renames custID, casts created_at to date, and unpacks address and preferences JSON fields.

model.televerket.stg__crm_contracts.name: stg__crm_contracts
model.televerket.stg__crm_contracts.description: One row per contract from the CRM source. Renames cust_id to customer_id and casts monthly_fee from VARCHAR to decimal.

model.televerket.stg__billing_payments.name: stg__billing_payments
model.televerket.stg__billing_payments.description: One row per payment record from the billing source. Contains duplicates — deduplicated in the intermediate layer.

model.televerket.stg__network_service_ac.name: stg__network_service_activations
model.televerket.stg__network_service_ac.description: One row per network activation from the OSS source. Renames cust_id to customer_id. device_info JSON is unpacked in the intermediate layer.

model.televerket.stg__network_incidents.name: stg__network_incidents
model.televerket.stg__network_incidents.description: One row per network incident from the OSS source. Renames inc_id to incident_id and customer_ref to customer_id.

model.televerket.stg__catalog_products.name: stg__catalog_products
model.televerket.stg__catalog_products.description: One row per product version from the product catalog. Includes valid_from / valid_to for historical versions.

model.televerket.stg__billing_invoices.name: stg__billing_invoices
model.televerket.stg__billing_invoices.description: One row per invoice from the billing source. Renames InvoiceID, converts YYYYMMDD date strings to DATE, and casts amount_eur to decimal.

model.televerket.int__network_incidents_.name: int__network_incidents_enriched
model.televerket.int__network_incidents_.description: One row per network incident, enriched with customer name, account status, and contract status from int__customers_enriched. Unresolved incidents are retained with null resolved_at and resolution_time_minutes.

model.televerket.int__billing_invoice_se.name: int__billing_invoice_settlement
model.televerket.int__billing_invoice_se.description: One row per invoice, enriched with the first payment received for that invoice. Duplicate payments are deduplicated by taking the earliest paid_on date. Invoices with no payment have null payment columns and is_paid = false.

model.televerket.int__customers_enriched.name: int__customers_enriched
model.televerket.int__customers_enriched.description: One row per customer, enriched with their latest active contract. Preferences (language, paperless, marketing) are carried through from staging. Customers without any active contract retain null contract columns.

model.televerket.int__customers_activati.name: int__customers_activations
model.televerket.int__customers_activati.description: One row per customer, enriched with their most recent network service activation and unpacked device information from device_info JSON. Customers with multiple activations (upgrades) retain only the latest.

metadata.test_query:
with all_values as (

    select
        status as value_field,
        count(*) as n_records

    from "televerket"."main"."stg__crm_contracts"
    group by status

)

select *
from all_values
where value_field not in (
    'active','suspended','terminated'
)

metadata.test_query:
with child as (
    select customer_id as from_field
    from "televerket"."main"."stg__billing_invoices"
    where customer_id is not null
),

parent as (
    select customer_id as to_field
    from "televerket"."main"."stg__crm_customers"
)

select
    from_field

from child
left join parent
    on child.from_field = parent.to_field

where parent.to_field is null
metadata.description: This test validates that all of the records in a child table have a corresponding record in a parent table. This property is referred to as "referential integrity".

metadata.test_query:
with child as (
    select customer_id as from_field
    from "televerket"."main"."stg__billing_invoices"
    where customer_id is not null
),

parent as (
    select customer_id as to_field
    from "televerket"."main"."stg__crm_customers"
)

select
    from_field

from child
left join parent
    on child.from_field = parent.to_field

where parent.to_field is null
metadata.description: This test validates that all of the records in a child table have a corresponding record in a parent table. This property is referred to as "referential integrity".

model_runs.name: stg__billing_invoices
model_runs.compiled_code:
with source as (
    select * from "televerket"."billing"."invoices"
),

casts as (
    select
        invoiceid as invoice_id,
        customer_id,
        
    strptime(invoice_date, '%Y%m%d')::date
 as invoice_date,
        
    strptime(due_date, '%Y%m%d')::date
     as due_date,
        try_cast(amount_eur as decimal(10, 2)) as amount_eur,
        status
    from source
)

select
    invoice_id,
    customer_id,
    invoice_date,
    due_date,
    amount_eur,
    status
from casts

        voice_min,
        valid_from::date as valid_from,
        valid_to::date as valid_to
    from source
)

select
    product_code,
    product_name,
    category,
    monthly_fee_eur,
    data_gb,
    voice_min,
    valid_from,
    valid_to
from casts

model_runs.name: stg__crm_customers
model_runs.compiled_code:
with source as (
    select * from "televerket"."crm"."customers"
),

casts as (
    select
        custid as customer_id,
        full_name,
        email,
        phone,
        status,
        created_at::date as created_at,
        address::json ->> 'street' as street,
        address::json ->> 'city' as city,
        address::json ->> 'zip' as zip_code,
        address::json ->> 'country' as country_code,
        preferences::json ->> 'language' as language,
        (preferences::json ->> 'paperless')::bool as use_paperless,
        (preferences::json ->> 'marketing_opt_in')::bool as is_marketing_enabled
    from source
)

select
    customer_id,
    full_name,
    email,
    phone,
    status,
    created_at,
    street,
    city,
    zip_code,
    country_code,
    language,
    use_paperless,
    is_marketing_enabled
from casts

        reported_at::timestamp as reported_at,
        resolved_at::timestamp as resolved_at,
        type,
        region,
        severity
    from source
)

select
    incident_id,
    customer_id,
    reported_at,
    resolved_at,
    type,
    region,
    severity
from casts
